overall.description: Cyberpunk 2077 gameplay footage featuring a rainy night in Night City. The clip begins at street level near the Afterlife bar with neon-lit wet streets and burning barrels, then transitions to an aerial drone view revealing industrial rooftops with steam vents and green pipes.

scene_state.functional_zone: cyberpunk commercial street with neon bar signs

agents.ego_description: flying drone low along wet city street, passing the Afterlife bar and burning barrels

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians walking along the sidewalk near the Afterlife bar entrance

entered.detail: red neon sign for the Afterlife bar, iconic location in Night City
metal barrel with open flames providing warmth on the rainy street
tall palm trees lining the street against the backdrop of skyscrapers
tall illuminated residential towers with countless lit windows
tall street lamp casting orange light on the wet pavement

segments.scene_description: The drone moves slowly through a rainy cyberpunk street at night, passing the Afterlife bar with its distinctive red neon signage. A burning barrel glows on the right while pedestrians walk in the distance, and tall skyscrapers loom overhead through the haze.

events.description: camera ascends rapidly from street level to aerial view revealing industrial rooftops

agents.ego_description: ascending drone revealing industrial infrastructure and steam vents from above

entered.detail: large green industrial pipes running horizontally across the rooftop
ventilation systems emitting thick white steam into the night air
industrial buildings and mechanical equipment on the rooftop

segments.scene_description: The drone ascends to a high aerial vantage point, revealing an industrial district with massive green pipes and steam vents on rooftops. The camera pans across the urban landscape, showing the city lights below and distant towers through the rainy night haze.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that begins at a gritty street level and ascends into a sweeping aerial view of a rainy industrial cityscape. It begins by gliding through a neon-lit alleyway past the red signage of the Afterlife bar, passing a glowing burning barrel as skyscrapers loom through the nocturnal haze. As the camera gains altitude, the street-level details fade away and the perspective shifts upward toward the rooftops of an industrial district. The scene then expands to reveal a complex network of massive green pipes and venting steam, before finally panning across the vast urban landscape of distant towers and shimmering city lights under a rainy night sky.
